title: Gears of ingenuity
description: Minecraft modpack based on the Create mod! An exciting adventure awaits you with a redesigned generation of the world and the end! The modpack contains all possible add-ons for Create 🔧
body:
![Welcome to the Gears of ingenuity!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c68d53167f5785834f554134a3f6cb00d0a25410.jpeg)
# **Gears of ingenuity**

Welcome to the amazing world of Minecraft with our modpack based on the Create mod! This modpack offers you a unique redesigned generation of a world where every corner is full of new possibilities.
______________________________________________________________________________________________

🚂 Bring your wildest projects to life, such as huge factories or trains!

🍳 Create mods for cooking lovers

⚡ A mod for electricity that allows you not to suffer with shafts over long distances

🌄 Completely redesigned world generation. New biomes, dungeons and structures make the world more diverse and exciting

🖼️ The screenshot viewer mod will allow you to view screenshots directly from the game with a user-friendly interface

🌀 The end has also suffered changes - the main island has changed, and the dragon is more difficult to kill
##  **📥 How to install?**
- Modrinth: Download the [modrinth](https://modrinth.com/app) official app
- Other launchers: modrinth modpacks are not supported by all launchers, a list of supported launchers and how to install the modpack can be found [here](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth)

Get ready to dive into an exciting adventure where your creativity will be the only limit!
